name: Venom
description: A Maliwan SMG variant that always spawns with a corrosive barrel, giving it stronger status chance and damage over time than most weapons in its tier. A matching Maliwan grip pushes those strengths even further. It is not a flashy rarity piece, but its reliable corrosive pressure can carry fights for a long time.
notes: Related Maliwan fixed-element SMGs include Provacateur for incendiary, Vexation for shock, Revenant for slag, and Hyperborean for cryo. A parts-generation quirk can make some blue versions display purple title text on the item card, and in Colorblind Mode they may even show as purple. Because of that bug, blue and purple versions with matching parts can end up with identical stats. Random world drop from suitable loot sources.
